Description

org.jscience.core.io

Provides the
invalid reference 
org.jscience.core.ml.mathml
module.
org.jscience.core.mathematics.loaders.oeis
Comprehensive mathematical structures, including algebra, calculus, and numerical analysis.
org.jscience.core.mathematics.loaders.openmath
Provides the
invalid reference 
org.jscience.core.ml.openmath
module.
org.jscience.core.methodology.loaders
 
org.jscience.nativ.physics.loaders.fits
 
org.jscience.nativ.physics.loaders.hdf5
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.biopax
BioPAX loader for biological pathways and networks.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.itis
Biological taxonomy, genetics, and physiological modeling.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.neuroml
NeuroML loader for computational neuroscience models.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.pdbml
PDBML loader for Protein Data Bank macromolecular structures.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.phyloxml
PhyloXML loader for phylogenetic tree data.
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for JScience.
org.jscience.natural.chemistry.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.chemistry.loaders.cml
Provides the org.jscience.natural.chemistry.loaders.cml module.
org.jscience.natural.computing.loaders.pmml
PMML (Predictive Model Markup Language) loader for machine learning models.
org.jscience.natural.device.loaders.nmea
 
org.jscience.natural.earth.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.medicine.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.astronomy
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.loaders.fits
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.loaders.thermoml
ThermoML loader for IUPAC/NIST thermodynamic property data.
org.jscience.social.architecture.loaders
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.architecture.loaders package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.arts.loaders
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.arts.loaders package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.economics.loaders
 
org.jscience.social.geography.loaders
 
org.jscience.social.geography.loaders.gml
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.geography.loaders.gml package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.history.loaders
 
org.jscience.social.law.loaders
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.law.loaders package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders
User interface components and internationalization support for JScience applications.
org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.
org.jscience.social.politics.loaders
 
org.jscience.social.sociology.loaders
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.sociology.loaders package in the JScience library.

    Description
    AbstractResourceReader
    Abstract base for resource readers with caching and fallback support.
    ResourceIO
    Common interface for all resource I/O components in JScience.
    ResourceReader
    Interface for components that read/load resources.
